expect: Yes. You can set up payments in hryvnia, dollars, or euros depending on your audience and payment system. For the Ukrainian market, we connect LiqPay or WayForPay, for international sales - Stripe. The client can see the price in the desired currency or proceed to payment through a separate page for a specific market. This is convenient if you sell courses, consultations, or digital products for several countries.
to: Yes. You can set up payments in GBP, plus EUR or USD if you sell to international students. For UK sales we connect GoCardless or Worldpay; for cross-border card payments, Stripe. The client can see the price in their currency, or pay through a separate page built for a specific market. That's handy if you sell courses, consultations, or digital products across several countries.
why: Lead GBP and drop hryvnia; swap LiqPay/WayForPay→GoCardless/Worldpay; drop Ukrainian-market framing; keep Stripe for international cards.
